detailedRecommendations.reason: Replaces offline file storage and paper documents with unified email, storage, and real-time document editing.
Automates bookkeeping, invoice distribution, and provides cloud ledger access for tax compliance.

securityRoadmap: Enforce Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) across all email and data providers.
Enforce Role-Based Access Controls (RBAC) to block unauthorized file sharing.
Set up automatic weekly cloud data backup snapshots with strict encryption.
Organize cyber security training sessions for employees.
budgetTips: Commit to annual subscription agreements to save up to 20% on software fees.
Utilize serverless functions (like AWS Lambda) to charge strictly on application requests.
Employ a dedicated implementation specialist to avoid costly setup mistakes.

actions: Audit all existing excel, paper resources.
Assign a migration coordinator to oversee project phases.
Integrate Google Workspace for collaboration & productivity.
Integrate QuickBooks Online for accounting & finance.
Configure security layers and identity protections (MFA).
Coordinate bulk document uploads to cloud-backed drives.
Initiate beta trials with select staff to fine-tune system configurations.
